This article is about the in-game item. For other uses of "moon", see Moon (Disambiguation).

Moon Shard is an item listed at the Base Shop, under Accessories. However, it is assembled entirely with items from the Secret Shop.

Moon Shard
Said to be a tear from the lunar goddess Selemene.
Accessories
Cost 4000
Sell Value 2000
Stacks 1 MAX / Inventory Slot
Active Consume
Charges 1 INIT
Passive ? Shade Sight
Bonus ? +140 Attack Speed
Shareable 0
Disassemble 0
Usage Alert ? 0
Recipe

Additional Information

[edit]
  • Attack speed bonus from multiple Moon Shards fully stacks. The attack speed bonus from the Consume buff fully stack with the item as well.

Abilities

[edit]

Consume

[edit]
Consume
▶️
Ability
Unit
Affects
Allied Heroes
Consumes the item to permanently gain bonus attack speed and bonus base night vision.

A hero can only consume the Moon Shard once per game.
Cast Animation: 0 + 0
Cast Range: Global
Max Buff per Hero: 1
Attack Speed Bonus: 60
Base Night Vision Bonus: 200
Within a certain range, the wielder does not need to face the unit-targeted allied hero to grant them the permanent buff.
Ally Cast Range: 250
0
  • Details
  • Interactions
  • Status Effects
  • Show All
    • Doubletap automatically self-targets.
  • Does not stack with Shade Sight.
  • Considers the Spirit Bear as heroes; clones, illusions and other creep-heroes as creeps.
Interactions: Self-Illusions
Cannot utilize the bonus attack speed component by design.

Other ability components are fully functional.
modifier_item_moon_shard_consumed
Moon Shard: Attack speed increased by x and night vision increased by x after consuming a Moon Shard.
MODIFIER_PROPERTY_ATTACKSPEED_BONUS_CONSTANT
MODIFIER_PROPERTY_BONUS_NIGHT_VISION_UNIQUE

Shade Sight

[edit]
Shade Sight
Ability
Passive
Affects
Self
Grants the wielder bonus night vision.
Night Vision Bonus: 400
The passive bonus has precedence over and does not stack with the consumed Moon Shard buff.
  • Details
  • Status Effects
  • Misc.
  • Show All
    • Multiple Shade Sight nighttime vision bonuses do not stack.
modifier_item_moon_shard
Hidden Modifier
MODIFIER_PROPERTY_ATTACKSPEED_BONUS_CONSTANT
MODIFIER_PROPERTY_BONUS_NIGHT_VISION_UNIQUE
    • Increases most heroes' nighttime vision to 400.

Recommended Heroes

[edit]

Moon Shard is generally purchased as a late game luxury item for carries that benefit from higher attack speed and night vision without taking an inventory slot.

Trivia

[edit]
  • Prior to the July 14, 2017 Patch, Moon Shard's active ability, Consume, did not have an official name. The name was taken from the Dota 2 Wiki and officially implemented into Dota 2.

Recent Changes

[edit]

Version
Description
7.17
(2018-06-10)
  • Increased Shade Sight nighttime vision bonus from 300 to 400.
  • Increased Consume nighttime vision bonus from 150 to 200.
7.16
(2018-05-27)
  • Increased attack speed bonus from 130 to 140.
7.12
(2018-03-29)
  • Increased attack speed bonus from 120 to 130.
